case_title: SIDNEY L. ROBBINS VS. ANNUZZI CONCRETE SERVICE, INC., A CALIFORNIA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBBINS, SIDNEY L. AS TO DEFENDANT ANNUZZI CONCRETE SERVICE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-18-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-19-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-03-2008
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-18-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBBINS, SIDNEY L. SERVED FEB-29-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANNUZZI CONCRETE SERVICE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON MAR-18-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ANNUZZI CONCRETE SERVICE, INC.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUL-21-2008. APR-18-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ANNUZZI CONCRETE SERVICE, INC. JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 10.0 DAYS
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUL-31-2008.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR BENJAMIN CLYDE HUTCHINSON.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR WALTER CURTIS COOK.
ARBITRATOR TERENCE FRENCH YOUNG APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-01-2008 THROUGH OCT-30-2008.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-02-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JAN-16-2009 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES ARE WAIVED. THE DEC-02-2008 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBBINS, SIDNEY L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANNUZZI CONCRETE SERVICE, INC. $11,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,000.00, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-16-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBBINS, SIDNEY L. AS TO DEFENDANT ANNUZZI CONCRETE SERVICE, INC.
